Anvil

Practice DSA
offline.

A desktop app for coding-interview & DSA practice — read, write, and run against real tests, all on your machine.

No internet · no account · original packs judged by a local sandbox that reveals the exact failing case.

Tauri 2 Rust Next.js Offline-first MIT
def two_sum(nums, target):
  seen = {}
  for i, n in enumerate(nums):
    if target - n in seen:
      return [seen[target-n], i]
    seen[n] = i
12 / 12 tests passed
